arts.ttl: Arsenal offered Randal Kolo Muani and Kingsley Coman to fix attacking issues but expensive fees and hefty wage demands scupper January deals
arts.sum: Arsenal are in the market for a forward but are unlikely to sign French duo Kolo Muani and Coman this month due to fee and wage demands.

arts.ttl: Ange: No sympathy for Arsenal over injuries ahead of NLD
arts.sum: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou says he has empathy rather than any sympathy for Arsenal's own injury woes ahead of Wednesday's North London derby.

arts.ttl: 'I know': Rio Ferdinand says Man United have a player who's actually a better creator than Martin Odegaard
Sources: £76.4m striker has been offered to Arteta in last 24 hours while Arsenal hold Zubimendi talks
Arsenal’s Striker Search Sends Shockwaves Through European Transfer Market
arts.sum: Arsenal have emerged as a major player in the January transfer window, with their sights set firmly on acquiring a top-class striker. After years of relying on versatile forwards and attacking midfielders, the North London club appears ready to invest heavily in a true number 9, potentially as soon as this month. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta handed new transfer blow as Arsenal face £100m bill for Gabriel Jesus replacement
arts.sum: Arsenal are desperate to sign a new striker in the January transfer window after losing Gabriel Jesus to injury, but one of their previous targets has been ruled out

arts.ttl: Tottenham linked player confirms contract talks after Spurs scouted him last month
arts.sum: Ajax youngster Rayan Bounida has confirmed his entourage are talking to the Dutch club about an extension, after Tottenham Hotspur scouted him last month. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from the midfielder today made to ESPN about his future and Ajax’s attempts to keep him. arts.ttl: Spurs boss Postecoglou has ‘no sympathy’ for Arsenal injury woes
arts.sum: Spurs manager Ange Postecoglou says he is empathetic to Arsenal’s injury plight, but has no sympathy for his north London rivals.
